title: codereview-P2: map_count change in encode_status_cbor should also apply pattern to time_fields and dodag_fields for consistency
description: The incremental check with cap is good for map_count. Similar uint8_t increments in time and dodag could theoretically wrap if many fields added in future (though currently <10). Opinion only as P3 since current values safe. Tracked but not in scope per task rules.
close_reason: P3 opinion tracked in CCP-1.5 for status struct extensions; map_count fix complete within scope, no dead code added
